rationale: This candidate provides the most natural and accurate German translation. It avoids the grammatical errors found in the 'current' and 'qwen3-32b' versions (e.g., 'an Bord der Zug fahre', 'Ostzeitzon'). It also maintains the technical tone and direct style of the original English text better than the 'gpt-oss-120b' version, which felt slightly more formal. MDX structure is perfectly preserved.
